DB Validation - payments table (1 entry - Successful Sale):
-> Verify ONE entry is created with the following fields:
   - payment_provider_id : 1 (Cardstream)
   - transaction_status_id : 1 (Success)
   - transaction_mode_id : 1 (Non-3DS)
   - transaction_method_id : 4 (Express Pay)
   - order_ref : order_id passed in payload
   - merchant_id : merchant_id passed in payload
   - country_code : As per merchant region (e.g. GB)
   - currency_code : As per merchant region (e.g. GBP)
   - gross : Amount passed in payload
   - fee : Calculated based on fee_tier of merchant
   - net : gross - fee
   - psp_reference : CS transaction reference returned by Cardstream gateway
   - internal_reference : O<order_id>M<merchant_id>T<payment_id>
   - last_4_digits : Last 4 digits of the card used
   - firstname : first_name from payload
   - lastname : last_name from payload
   - email_address : email from payload
   - master_token_id : Resolved master_token_id from master_token table
   - shopper_id : customer_id from payload
   - cs_mid : Cardstream MID used for processing
   - TxAuthNo : Auth number returned by Cardstream gateway
   - transaction_time : Timestamp of transaction (valid BST/UTC time)
   - delete_status : 0
   - withdrawn_status : 0

DB Validation - payments table (Invalid sale scenarios):
-> For each INVALID scenario (wrong provider / wrong merchant_id / incorrect CVV / wrong email / sending != 'to'):
   - If rejected by our system before reaching Cardstream gateway:
     Verify NO entry is created in the payments table
   - If sent to Cardstream gateway and declined:
     Verify ONE entry exists with transaction_status_id : 7 (Declined) or 9 (Failed)
     psp_reference : NULL or CS decline reference
     TxAuthNo : NULL
     last_4_digits : NULL

   - payment_provider_id : 1 (Cardstream)
   - transaction_status_id : 7 (Declined by gateway) or 9 (Failed)

   - transaction_method_id : 4 (Express Pay)
   - order_ref : order_id passed in payload
   - merchant_id : merchant_id passed in payload
   - gross : Amount passed in payload
   - fee : 0 (no fee charged on declined transactions)
   - net : 0
   - psp_reference : CS decline reference (if returned by gateway)
   - internal_reference : NULL or O<order_id>M<merchant_id>T<payment_id>

   - TxAuthNo : NULL
   - master_token_id : Resolved master_token_id (if token lookup succeeded)
   - shopper_id : customer_id from payload
   - cs_mid : Cardstream MID attempted
   - delete_status : 0
   - withdrawn_status : 0

Note: Empty or invalid AVS values for UK delivery (sending=to) on Cardstream result in a declined transaction (transaction_status_id : 7 or 9). An entry is created in the payments table with the failed status.
